title: Why Your Skin Heals Slower After 40 (And What Helps Speed It Up)
tags: skin healing, skin after 40, collagen decline, wound healing, estrogen skin, marine collagen, glow shot
excerpt: Cuts that linger, blemishes that stay for weeks, bruises that fade slowly: if your skin heals slower after 40, it is not your imagination. Declining collagen, reduced fibroblast activity, and estrogen loss are the real reasons, and targeted nutrition can help.
seo_title: Why Your Skin Heals Slower After 40 (And What Helps)
meta_description: Skin healing slows after 40 due to collagen decline, aging fibroblasts, and dropping estrogen. Learn what nutrients and marine collagen can do to help repair speed.
author: Happy Aging Team
